item.title: KFC Bucket Hack Recipe
item.description: A creative food hack inspired by a KFC-style bucket, combining fried chicken, sides, and layered flavors for a fun comfort meal.

item.title: Smashed Potatoes Recipe
item.description: Crispy smashed potatoes baked to perfection, seasoned and roasted for a simple, flavorful side dish with a crunchy golden finish.

item.title: Fried Ice Cream Sandwiches
item.description: Frozen ice cream sandwiches coated and fried for a crispy shell and creamy center. A quick dessert recipe with simple steps and a sweet finishing touch.

media:content.media:description: Frozen ice cream sandwiches coated and fried for a crispy shell and creamy center. A quick dessert recipe with simple steps and a sweet finishing touch.
